signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows flicker; trust no gain without deeper asks.
signals.questPulse: Digital gold slipping; scramble nodes before the collapse.
signals.worldFeed: Market pulse weakens; silent whispers of vault cracks.
signals.clueEvent: Map fragments hint at hidden coin dumps.

signals.npcLine: Ghost token RAVE echoes cold signals in the net.
signals.questPulse: Trace RAVE's phantom trails; uncover lost ledger entries.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE trading volume extinguished into the void.
signals.clueEvent: Data leak points to rogue node near sector ##.

signals.npcLine: WOJAK brokers murmur deals slipping through neon cracks.
signals.questPulse: Hunt for WOJAK smuggler before fear floods streets.
signals.worldFeed: WOJAK spikes in hidden markets; tension rises.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted messages hint at WOJAK redistribution.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid mining rigs exposed; sabotage incoming.
signals.questPulse: Secure the rigs, prevent data breach, hold ground.
signals.worldFeed: Asteroid sector under attack; ops scrambling response.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips market nodes; system-wide hesitation spikes.
signals.questPulse: Adjust strategies; market's on edge, signals unstable.
signals.worldFeed: Global market indexes sputtering; digital trust fraying.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable data clusters spreading in core nets.
